title: Unlimited AI tokens aren't unlimited after all as US Army burns through supply
excerpt: Troops received an email informing them that they were rapidly depleting their AI tokens.
content_html:
In order to use Ask Sage, the Army had access to 100,000,000 tokens as part of an annual subscription to an “enterprise pack.” Tokens represent a unit of output, either in text or image, from an LLM. For the Ask Sage tool, a single token equates to about 3.7 characters, according to documents viewed by WIRED. The Defense Department burned through some 20 billion tokens per day during the 38-day Operation Epic Fury in Iran, according to Breaking Defense.

The Army and DOD didn’t reply to requests for comment; neither did Ask Sage.

It’s unclear if the tokens used by regular DOD employees are drawn from the same pool as those who might be using AI tools on classified or secret information. This hasn’t stopped the Defense Department’s emphasis on AI. On Monday, the Intercept reported that the Pentagon has continued to lean into AI tools, and has cut the staff at the Civilian Protection Center of Excellence, whose jobs entailed preventing civilian casualties in conflict zones. Instead, the DOD is developing an AI tool to speed up the assessments that the Center’s staff would normally make.

The Army is not the first eager adopter of generative AI to rethink their near unlimited use. After encouraging employees to “tokenmaxx,” Meta quietly took down its leaderboard tracking token usage and is now trying to curb use. Last week, Adam Mosseri, head of Instagram at Meta, floated the idea of capping token use per engineer at the company. According to reporting from Fortune, Uber also saw its engineers burning through a year’s worth of generative AI tokens in merely four months.

The Army employee says they have not found the generative AI tools to be particularly useful for their work, and that when they have used the tools, they have found them to be unreliable. One model even asserted that it had completed a task that it hadn’t, they say. “I think there are definitely several aspects of the bureaucracy of the US federal government that these tools might be helpful with. But an unthinking application and use is not going to result in an effective, efficient, and trustworthy rollout.”

This story originally appeared on wired.com.

sentences.zh: 据 Breaking Defense 报道，在伊朗为期 38 天的史诗愤怒行动中，国防部每天烧毁约 200 亿枚代币。

sentences.zh: 陆军和国防部没有回复置评请求；问圣人也没有。

sentences.en: It’s unclear if the tokens used by regular DOD employees are drawn from the same pool as those who might be using AI tools on classified or secret information.
sentences.zh: 目前尚不清楚国防部普通员工使用的代币是否与那些可能在机密或秘密信息上使用人工智能工具的代币来自同一个池。

sentences.en: This hasn’t stopped the Defense Department’s emphasis on AI.
sentences.zh: 这并没有阻止国防部对人工智能的重视。

sentences.en: On Monday, the Intercept reported that the Pentagon has continued to lean into AI tools, and has cut the staff at the Civilian Protection Center of Excellence, whose jobs entailed preventing civilian casualties in conflict zones.
sentences.zh: 周一，Intercept 报道称，五角大楼继续倾向于人工智能工具，并裁减了平民保护卓越中心的工作人员，该中心的工作职责是防止冲突地区的平民伤亡。

sentences.en: Instead, the DOD is developing an AI tool to speed up the assessments that the Center’s staff would normally make.
sentences.zh: 相反，国防部正在开发一种人工智能工具，以加快该中心工作人员通常进行的评估。

Last week, Adam Mosseri, head of Instagram at Meta, floated the idea of capping token use per engineer at the company. According to reporting from Fortune, Uber also saw its engineers burning through a year’s worth of generative AI tokens in merely four months.

sentences.en: The Army is not the first eager adopter of generative AI to rethink their near unlimited use.
sentences.zh: 陆军并不是第一个热衷于采用生成式人工智能并重新考虑其近乎无限制的使用的国家。

sentences.en: After encouraging employees to “tokenmaxx,” Meta quietly took down its leaderboard tracking token usage and is now trying to curb use.
sentences.zh: 在鼓励员工使用“tokenmaxx”后，Meta 悄悄取消了跟踪代币使用情况的排行榜，现在正试图限制使用。

sentences.en: Last week, Adam Mosseri, head of Instagram at Meta, floated the idea of capping token use per engineer at the company.
sentences.zh: 上周，Meta 的 Instagram 负责人 Adam Mosseri 提出了限制公司每位工程师代币使用的想法。

sentences.en: According to reporting from Fortune, Uber also saw its engineers burning through a year’s worth of generative AI tokens in merely four months.
sentences.zh: 据《财富》杂志报道，Uber 的工程师在短短四个月内就消耗掉了一年的生成式 AI 代币。

blocks.html_en: The Army employee says they have not found the generative AI tools to be particularly useful for their work, and that when they have used the tools, they have found them to be unreliable. One model even asserted that it had completed a task that it hadn’t, they say. “I think there are definitely several aspects of the bureaucracy of the US federal government that these tools might be helpful with. But an unthinking application and use is not going to result in an effective, efficient, and trustworthy rollout.”

sentences.en: The Army employee says they have not found the generative AI tools to be particularly useful for their work, and that when they have used the tools, they have found them to be unreliable.
sentences.zh: 这名陆军员工表示，他们还没有发现生成式人工智能工具对他们的工作特别有用，而且当他们使用这些工具时，他们发现它们不可靠。

sentences.en: One model even asserted that it had completed a task that it hadn’t, they say.
sentences.zh: 他们说，一个模型甚至声称它已经完成了一项实际上没有完成的任务。

sentences.en: “I think there are definitely several aspects of the bureaucracy of the US federal government that these tools might be helpful with.
sentences.zh: “我认为这些工具肯定会对美国联邦政府官僚机构的几个方面有所帮助。

sentences.en: But an unthinking application and use is not going to result in an effective, efficient, and trustworthy rollout.”
sentences.zh: 但不加思考的应用和使用不会带来有效、高效和值得信赖的部署。”

sentences.en: This story originally appeared on wired.com.
sentences.zh: 这个故事最初出现在wired.com上。

content_html_zh:
为了使用 Ask Sage，陆军可以获得 100,000,000 个代币，作为“企业包”年度订阅的一部分。 令牌代表法学硕士的文本或图像输出单位。 根据 WIRED 查看的文档，对于 Ask Sage 工具，单个标记相当于大约 3.7 个字符。 据 Breaking Defense 报道，在伊朗为期 38 天的史诗愤怒行动中，国防部每天烧毁约 200 亿枚代币。

陆军和国防部没有回复置评请求；问圣人也没有。

目前尚不清楚国防部普通员工使用的代币是否与那些可能在机密或秘密信息上使用人工智能工具的代币来自同一个池。 这并没有阻止国防部对人工智能的重视。 周一，Intercept 报道称，五角大楼继续倾向于人工智能工具，并裁减了平民保护卓越中心的工作人员，该中心的工作职责是防止冲突地区的平民伤亡。 相反，国防部正在开发一种人工智能工具，以加快该中心工作人员通常进行的评估。

陆军并不是第一个热衷于采用生成式人工智能并重新考虑其近乎无限制的使用的国家。 在鼓励员工使用“tokenmaxx”后，Meta 悄悄取消了跟踪代币使用情况的排行榜，现在正试图限制使用。 上周，Meta 的 Instagram 负责人 Adam Mosseri 提出了限制公司每位工程师代币使用的想法。 据《财富》杂志报道，Uber 的工程师在短短四个月内就消耗掉了一年的生成式 AI 代币。

这名陆军员工表示，他们还没有发现生成式人工智能工具对他们的工作特别有用，而且当他们使用这些工具时，他们发现它们不可靠。 他们说，一个模型甚至声称它已经完成了一项实际上没有完成的任务。 “我认为这些工具肯定会对美国联邦政府官僚机构的几个方面有所帮助。 但不加思考的应用和使用不会带来有效、高效和值得信赖的部署。”

这个故事最初出现在wired.com上。
